title: NaWorld Horror Adventure
body:
# 🎃 Horror Adventure | 恐怖冒險整合包

> **支援**：單人 & 伺服器（Client & Server）  
> **語言**：🌐 繁體中文 / 🇬🇧 English

---

## 🌟 特色亮點 | Key Highlights

| 🌐 繁體中文 | 🇬🇧 English |
|:---|:---|
| 🔫 **火力槍械**：`[TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero` 提供多樣化槍枝，讓戰鬥更具策略性！ | 🔫 **Firepower**: Access a wide arsenal from `[TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero` for strategic combat! |
| 🕹 **流暢移動**：`ParCool!` 加入跑酷機制，探索更暢快！ | 🕹 **Smooth Movement**: `ParCool!` adds parkour mechanics for agile navigation! |

---

## 📖 簡介 | Overview

**繁體中文**  
Horror Adventure 是一款結合 **恐怖元素**、**冒險探索**、**科技鍛造** 與 **多樣玩法** 的整合包。  
- 🌄 `Terralith` + `YUNG’s` 帶來壯麗秘境  
- 🌀 `The Aether` 經典維度挑戰  
- ⚙️ `IC2Classic` + `Applied Energistics 2` 打造自動化工業  
- 👻 `More Zombies`、`Nightmare`、`TrueHerobrine` 提升驚悚體驗  
- 🌾 `Farmer’s Delight`、`Pam’s HarvestCraft 2`、`Macaw’s 系列` 建築裝飾  

**English**  
Horror Adventure blends **horror**, **exploration**, **industrial crafting**, and **diverse gameplay**.  
- 🌄 Stunning worlds with `Terralith` + `YUNG’s`  
- 🌀 Mystical dungeons in `The Aether`  
- ⚙️ Automated bases via `IC2Classic` + `Applied Energistics 2`  
- 👻 Spine-chilling scares from `More Zombies`, `Nightmare`, `TrueHerobrine`  
- 🌾 Farm & build with `Farmer’s Delight`, `Pam’s HarvestCraft 2`, `Macaw’s` series  

---

Feel free to adjust any icons or wording to better fit your style!

---

## 🔧 主要模組精選 | Core Mods

<details>
<summary>🔍 展開 / Show Core Mods</summary>

- 🌄 **Terralith** – 重做地形／Overhauls terrain  
- 🌳 **Oh The Biomes You’ll Go (BYG)** – 多樣生態／Diverse biomes  
- 💾 **Applied Energistics 2** – 工業自動化／High-tech storage  
- 🌸 **Botania** – 自然魔法／Flower-based magic  
- ⚒️ **Tinkers’ Construct** – 客製武具／Custom tool forging  
- 👻 **The Graveyard**, **Nightmare**, **TrueHerobrine** – 恐怖氛圍／Horror mobs & structures  
- 🍽️ **Farmer’s Delight**, **Pam’s HarvestCraft 2** – 食物與烹飪／Expanded farming  
- 🛋️ **Macaw’s 系列** – 家具裝飾／Decorative blocks  
- 🛡️ **Majrusz’s Difficulty**, **Serene Seasons**, **Cold Sweat** – 生存挑戰／Hardcore survival  
- 🚀 **Rubidium**, **Oculus**, **ImmediatelyFast**… – 效能與便利／Performance & QoL  

</details>

---

## 💾 系統需求 | Recommended Specs

**繁體中文**  
- 建議記憶體：4–8 GB JVM  
- 作業系統：Windows 10/11 或等效  
- CPU/GPU：Intel i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 以上，GTX 1660 / RX 6600 以上  

**English**  
- Recommended Memory: 4–8 GB JVM  
- OS: Windows 10/11 (or equivalent)  
- CPU/GPU: Intel i5 / AMD Ryzen 5+, GTX 1660 / RX 6600+  

> **注意/Note**：如遇模組衝突，請移除相應插件以維持穩定。
